title: Dread Lord
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dread Lord''' was an alternate form of address for the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. It was later one of the titles used by [[Darth Krayt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
*[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]
*[[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]]
